2604.22869.title: Avionic Main Fuel Pump Simulation and Fault-Diagnosis Benchmark
2604.22869.paper_summary: In many cyber-physical systems, especially in critical applications such as aeroplanes, data to train anomaly detection and diagnosis algorithms is lacking due to data protection issues and partial observability. To combat this inherent lack of data, we introduce a high-fidelity, physics-informed co-simulation of a common aircraft main-fuel-pump system modelled in \textsc{MATLAB/Simulink Simscape Fluids}. We also describe its generated time-series data with health and fault mode annotations. To show feasibility of our benchmark, we apply an unsupervised Recurrent Variational Autoencoder (RNN-VAE) for anomaly detection and a SOM-VAE for operating mode discretization, trained to separate healthy and faulty conditions.
2604.22869.paper_summary_zh: 在許多網絡物理系統中，尤其是在像飛機這樣的關鍵應用中，由於數據保護問題和部分可觀察性，訓練異常檢測和診斷算法所需的數據不足。為了應對這種固有的數據缺乏，我們引入了一個高保真、物理知識驅動的共同模擬，該模擬基於在 \textsc{MATLAB/Simulink Simscape Fluids} 中建模的常見飛機主燃油泵系統。我們還描述了其生成的帶有健康和故障模式註釋的時間序列數據。為了展示我們基準的可行性，我們應用了一種無監督的遞歸變分自編碼器 (RNN-VAE) 進行異常檢測，並使用 SOM-VAE 進行操作模式離散化，訓練以區分健康和故障狀態。
2604.22869.author: Felix Leonhard Janzen et.al.
2604.22869.authors: Felix Leonhard Janzen, Lukas Moddemann, Alexander Diedrich, Oliver Niggemann
